home.heroBody: Bitmain Antminer & Avalon — we are official suppliers. Delivery from China in 10–14 days. Fixed price at the time of order.
home.calcBody: Calculate your miner's payback. We factor in the current rate and network difficulty.
home.testimonial1Text: Ordered an Antminer S21 Pro, delivered in 12 days. The price was lower than competitors, and the warranty is real. All the equipment was tested in front of me before shipping. I recommend it to every serious miner.
home.testimonial2Text: Brought in two Whatsminer M60S units for repair — both were restored in a day. The technicians know their craft, the parts are genuine, and they gave a warranty on the work. This is already my third time here.
home.testimonial3Text: I placed 8 machines in the mining hotel. The rate is fair, monitoring is 24/7, and every month I get a detailed report with payouts. Peace of mind for the equipment is priceless.
home.testimonial4Text: Firmware tuned to our rate added +11% to profit. The manager explained every parameter and configured it remotely. Communication was fast and no questions were left.
home.service1Desc: Full fault diagnostics, repair of hashboards and power supplies within 24 hours.
home.service1Back: We'll restore your miner in the shortest time. In-house workshop, genuine parts, warranty on the work.
home.service2Desc: Firmware updates, pool setup, overclocking tuned to your electricity rate.
home.service2Back: We maximize your equipment's profitability. Individually selected mode for your rate and conditions.
home.service3Desc: Equipment hosting at an industrial site. Rate UAH 3.6/kWh, our commission only 10% of the mined coin, 24/7 monitoring.
home.service3Back: An industrial site with reliable power and cooling. Your equipment under round-the-clock security.

services.metaDescription: ASIC miner repair and diagnostics, firmware, configuration and mining hotel.
services.heroBody: Full-cycle ASIC miner servicing — from repair to hosting at an industrial site.
services.service1Short: Restoring faulty miners of any complexity
services.service1Desc: Our own certified workshop in Dnipro and Kyiv. Genuine parts in stock — no waiting on supply. 3-month warranty on completed work.
services.service1Item1: Full diagnostics of hashboards, PSU and control board
services.service1Item2: ASIC chip replacement: BM1370, BM1368, BM1366, BM1362
services.service1Item3: Repair and replacement of power supplies
services.service1Item4: Fixing short circuits and overheating damage
services.service1Item5: Cleaning, thermal paste application, fan replacement
services.service1Item6: Stress test under load for 24+ h with a report
services.service2Short: Maximum profitability tuned to your electricity rate
services.service2Desc: Individually tailored operating mode for your rate and cooling conditions. We support Antminer, Whatsminer, Avalon and other platforms.
services.service2Item1: Updating official firmware to the latest version
services.service2Item2: Installing custom OS: Braiins OS+, VNish, LuxOS
services.service2Item3: Mining pool, worker and backup pool configuration
services.service2Item4: Overclocking and selecting the optimal hashrate/power profile
services.service2Item5: Auto-tuning setup for the temperature range
services.service2Item6: Connecting monitoring, alerts and a Telegram bot
services.service3Desc: A dedicated site with industrial 380V power, powerful cooling and round-the-clock security. You get a monthly report and access to online monitoring.
services.service3Item2: Electricity paid one month in advance
services.service3Item3: Our commission — only 10% of the mined coin
services.service3Item5: Powerful ventilation and air conditioning — temperature up to +25°C
services.service3Item7: Round-the-clock technical monitoring, reboot on request
services.service3Item8: Detailed monthly report on consumption and hashrate
services.faq1A: Free when you order a repair. If you decline the repair — $10. We provide a written conclusion.
services.faq2Q: What warranty do I get after a repair?
services.faq2A: 3 months on the completed work. Replaced components carry the manufacturer's warranty. If the fault recurs — we fix it free of charge.
services.faq3Q: How do I submit a device for repair?
services.faq3A: Drop-off in Kyiv or Dnipro. We also accept shipments via Nova Poshta — we pack and return it at our expense.
services.faq4Q: What are the minimum requirements for the mining hotel?
services.faq4A: From 1 device. We sign a contract and provide access to online monitoring and a monthly report.
services.faq5Q: Can custom firmware be installed on any miner?
services.faq5A: Braiins OS+ and VNish support most Antminer models. For Whatsminer — LuxOS. Check compatibility for your model.
services.faq6Q: How long do firmware and configuration take?
services.faq6A: Usually 1–4 hours. Remotely — if the miner is connected to the network. On-site or at the service center — by arrangement.
services.faq7Q: What power supply does the mining hotel have?
services.faq7A: Industrial 380V / 50Hz grid with a dedicated transformer. UPS on critical infrastructure, automatic switchover.
services.faq8Q: Can I visit the mining hotel in person?
services.faq8A: Yes, by prior arrangement. We give a tour and show the hosting conditions for your equipment.
services.ctaBody: Get in touch for a consultation or to submit a device for service.

asicHub.modelsCount: {count} models in stock and on order
asicHub.sha256H1: Buy Antminer — ASIC for Bitcoin mining
asicHub.sha256Title: Buy Antminer — ASIC for Bitcoin (SHA-256) | Trade M
asicHub.sha256Description: Buy Antminer for Bitcoin mining: S21, S23, S19 and other SHA-256 ASICs. Current prices, delivery across Ukraine, warranty, service and mining hotel.
asicHub.sha256Intro: SHA-256 is the algorithm of the Bitcoin network, and Bitmain's Antminer is the main ASIC line for mining it. Here you'll find the available models: from compact S19 units to industrial S21 and S23 Hydro rigs. Compare hashrate, power and profitability or calculate payback in the calculator.
asicHub.sha256BodyHeading: How to buy an Antminer at Trade M
asicHub.sha256Body: Trade M is an official Bitmain Antminer supplier in Ukraine. We bring in current S-series models (S19, S21, S23) with a price fixed at the time of order and delivery from China in 10–14 days. Every miner is inspected and stress-tested before shipping, and all hardware carries a 6-month warranty. If needed, we install firmware tuned to your tariff and host the equipment in our mining hotel at UAH 3.6/kWh.
asicHub.sha256Faq1Q: Which Antminer should I choose for Bitcoin mining?
asicHub.sha256Faq1A: S19-series models suit a home or small farm; for maximum efficiency choose the S21 and S23 Hydro with liquid cooling. We'll match a model to your electricity tariff and budget — get in touch for a consultation.
asicHub.sha256Faq2Q: How much does an Antminer cost?
asicHub.sha256Faq2A: The price depends on the model and hashrate: from ~$800 for an S19 to $30,000+ for the top S23 Hydro. Current prices are shown on the product cards above and are fixed at the time of order.
asicHub.sha256Faq3Q: Is there a warranty on the Antminer?
asicHub.sha256Faq3A: Yes, all hardware comes with a 6-month warranty. Before shipping, each miner is inspected and stress-tested under load.
asicHub.sha256Faq4Q: How does delivery across Ukraine work?
asicHub.sha256Faq4A: We ship via Nova Poshta across Ukraine or offer pickup in Kyiv and Dnipro. New models are brought from China in 10–14 days.
asicHub.sha256Faq5Q: Can the firmware be configured right away?
asicHub.sha256Faq5A: Yes. We install official or custom firmware (Braiins OS+, VNish, LuxOS) and set up the pool and overclock for your tariff to maximize profitability.
asicHub.sha256Faq6Q: Where can I host the Antminer I bought?
asicHub.sha256Faq6A: In our mining hotel: an industrial 380V site, UAH 3.6/kWh tariff, electricity paid one month in advance, our commission only 10% of the mined coin, and 24/7 monitoring.
asicHub.scryptH1: Buy Antminer L7/L9 — ASIC for Litecoin and Dogecoin
asicHub.scryptTitle: Buy Antminer L7, L9 — ASIC for Litecoin/Dogecoin | Trade M
asicHub.scryptDescription: Buy Scrypt ASICs for Litecoin and Dogecoin mining: Antminer L7, L9, L11, ElphaPex DG and more. Merged LTC+DOGE mining, current prices, delivery across Ukraine, warranty.
asicHub.scryptIntro: Scrypt is the algorithm of the Litecoin and Dogecoin networks: the ASIC mines LTC while DOGE is earned on top at the same hashrate (merged mining). Here you'll find the Antminer L7, L9, L11, ElphaPex DG and more — compare hashrate (GH/s), power and profitability or calculate payback in the calculator.
asicHub.scryptBodyHeading: How to buy an ASIC for Litecoin and Dogecoin
asicHub.scryptBody: Trade M is an official Scrypt ASIC supplier in Ukraine. We bring in the Antminer L7, L9, L11, ElphaPex DG and other models with a price fixed at the time of order and delivery from China in 10–14 days. The Scrypt advantage is merged mining: you earn Litecoin and Dogecoin at the same time with no loss of performance. Every miner is tested before shipping and carries a 6-month warranty; if needed we configure firmware and host the equipment in our mining hotel at UAH 3.6/kWh.
asicHub.scryptFaq1Q: Can I mine Litecoin and Dogecoin at the same time?
asicHub.scryptFaq1A: Yes. The Scrypt algorithm supports merged mining: the ASIC mines LTC while DOGE is earned on top at the same hashrate — with no loss of performance or extra power draw.
asicHub.scryptFaq2Q: Which Antminer should I choose for Scrypt?
asicHub.scryptFaq2A: The Antminer L7 is a proven workhorse, the L9 is newer and more efficient. There are also the L11, ElphaPex DG and others. We'll match an option to your electricity tariff and budget — get in touch for a consultation.
asicHub.scryptFaq3Q: How much does a Scrypt ASIC cost?
asicHub.scryptFaq3A: Depending on the model and hashrate, from ~$1,100 to $7,000+. Current prices are shown on the product cards above and are fixed at the time of order.
asicHub.scryptFaq4Q: Is there a warranty and delivery across Ukraine?
asicHub.scryptFaq4A: Yes, a 6-month warranty on all hardware. We ship via Nova Poshta across Ukraine or offer pickup in Kyiv and Dnipro; new models are brought from China in 10–14 days.
asicHub.scryptFaq5Q: Is mining Litecoin/Dogecoin profitable right now?
asicHub.scryptFaq5A: Profitability depends on the LTC and DOGE price and your electricity tariff. Calculate the payback of a specific model in our calculator — the profitability data updates live.
asicHub.scryptFaq6Q: Where can I host a Scrypt miner?
asicHub.scryptFaq6A: In our mining hotel: an industrial 380V site, UAH 3.6/kWh tariff, electricity paid one month in advance, our commission only 10% of the mined coin, and 24/7 monitoring.
asicHub.kaspaTitle: ASIC for Kaspa mining (KHeavyHash) — buy | Trade M
asicHub.kaspaDescription: Catalog of KHeavyHash ASIC miners for Kaspa (KAS) mining: Antminer KS7 and more. Current prices, delivery across Ukraine, service and mining hotel.
asicHub.kaspaIntro: KHeavyHash is the algorithm of the Kaspa (KAS) network, one of the fastest blockchain networks. Here you'll find ASIC miners for mining Kaspa. Compare hashrate (TH/s), power and profitability or calculate payback in the calculator.
asicHub.zcashH1: Buy Antminer Z15 Pro — ASIC for Zcash mining
asicHub.zcashTitle: Buy Antminer Z15 Pro — ASIC for Zcash (Equihash) | Trade M
asicHub.zcashDescription: Buy the Antminer Z15 Pro for Zcash (ZEC) mining on the Equihash algorithm. Current prices, delivery across Ukraine, warranty, service and mining hotel.
asicHub.zcashIntro: Equihash is the algorithm of the Zcash (ZEC) network. The Antminer Z15 Pro is a dedicated ASIC for mining it, with 840 kSol/s of hashrate. Compare models, power and profitability or calculate payback in the calculator.
asicHub.zcashBodyHeading: How to buy an Antminer Z15 Pro for Zcash
asicHub.zcashBody: Trade M is an official Zcash ASIC supplier in Ukraine. We bring in the Antminer Z15 Pro (840 kSol/s) with a price fixed at the time of order and delivery from China in 10–14 days. Every miner is inspected and tested before shipping and carries a 6-month warranty. If needed, we install firmware tuned to your tariff and host the equipment in our mining hotel at UAH 3.6/kWh.
asicHub.zcashFaq1Q: Which ASIC do I need to mine Zcash?
asicHub.zcashFaq1A: Zcash (ZEC) runs on the Equihash algorithm, which needs a dedicated ASIC. The most common model is the Antminer Z15 Pro with 840 kSol/s of hashrate.
asicHub.zcashFaq2Q: How much does the Antminer Z15 Pro cost?
asicHub.zcashFaq2A: Depending on the batch, from ~$6,250 to $8,500. Current prices are shown on the product cards above and are fixed at the time of order.
asicHub.zcashFaq3Q: What other coins can be mined on Equihash?
asicHub.zcashFaq3A: Besides Zcash (ZEC), Equihash supports a number of other coins (for example, Horizen/ZEN). Check the compatibility of your chosen coin with your model.
asicHub.zcashFaq4Q: Is there a warranty and delivery across Ukraine?
asicHub.zcashFaq4A: Yes, a 6-month warranty on all hardware. We ship via Nova Poshta across Ukraine or offer pickup in Kyiv and Dnipro; new batches are brought from China in 10–14 days.
asicHub.zcashFaq5Q: Is mining Zcash profitable right now?
asicHub.zcashFaq5A: Profitability depends on the ZEC price and your electricity tariff. Calculate the Antminer Z15 Pro payback in our calculator — the data updates live.
asicHub.zcashFaq6Q: Where can I host the Antminer Z15 Pro?
asicHub.zcashFaq6A: In our mining hotel: an industrial 380V site, UAH 3.6/kWh tariff, electricity paid one month in advance, our commission only 10% of the mined coin, and 24/7 monitoring.
